dictionary_sections.definition: RESERVED SIGNAL CONTINUITY GAP ID1157 is a source-backed registry entry whose production form is anchored to the reviewed equation \vec{A}_{\text{dipole}}(\vec{r},t) = \frac{\mu_{0}}{4\pi}\frac{\vec{\mu}_{\text{eff}}(t)\times(\vec{r}-\vec{r}_{\text{cm}}(t))}{|\vec{r}-\vec{r}_{\text{cm}}(t)|^{3}} ; \vec{\mu}_{\text{eff}} ; \vec{r}_{\text{cm}} ; \vec{r} \ne \vec{r}_{\text{cm}}. The entry records the mathematical object, condition, or operator named by the title and prepares it for the locked TZPID four-page layout.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: In context, RESERVED SIGNAL CONTINUITY GAP ID1157 functions as a local mathematical checkpoint. The canonical equation gives the entry its printable formal spine, while the supporting equations show how the relation is used or constrained inside the surrounding registry arc.

wolfram.existing_from_tex:
\[
\begin{aligned}
\mathfrak{W}_{\mathrm{TZP}}\!\left(\mathcal{K}_{1157}\right)
&\longmapsto
\left\langle \Omega^{\mathbb{T}},\; \Psi_{\mathrm{T}},\; \rho_{\mathrm{vac}} \right\rangle
\end{aligned}
\]
\[
\mathcal{K}_{1157}
:=
\operatorname{HoldForm}\!\left(\mathcal{T}_{1157}\right)
\]
\[
\begin{aligned}
\operatorname{Admissible}_{\mathrm{TZP}}\!\left(\mathcal{K}_{1157}\right)
&\Longleftrightarrow
\mathfrak{W}_{\mathrm{TZP}}\!\left(\mathcal{K}_{1157}\right)\not\equiv\varnothing
\end{aligned}
\]
